subject: fix(theme): migrate DebugPill to DaisyUI semantic tokens
body:
Replace all hardcoded hex colors and rgba values in DebugPill.css with
DaisyUI CSS variable references (var(--color-base-*), var(--color-error),
etc.) and color-mix() for opacity variants. DebugPill now theme-aware —
adapts to both dark and light mode.

DebugPill.tsx severity colors (info/success/warn/error) now read from
DaisyUI computed styles via getCSSColor(). Source colors remain as a
20-color data visualization palette (DaisyUI only provides ~10 semantic
colors, insufficient for 20 distinct log sources).

Tags: theme, daisyui, debug, cleanup
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
